What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

We'd make out in your Mustang to Radiohead

Talk about our future like we had a clue

In another life, I would be your girl

So I don't have to say you were the one that got away

I was June and you were my Johnny Cash
Never one without the other, we made a pact

But in another life, I would be your girl

snippet.title: ROCKY 7: 2027 Final Round | Sylvester Stallone, Mike Tyson, Arnold Schwarzenegger | Concept Trailer
snippet.description:
#Rocky7 #SylvesterStallone #concepttrailer 

Witness the ultimate clash of boxing legends in this thrilling Rocky 7 fan concept trailer.

Imagine a What If scenario where the Italian Stallion returns to the ring for one final round against the most formidable opponents imaginable. I personally created the storyboard and visuals for this project to bring together Sylvester Stallone, Mike Tyson, and Arnold Schwarzenegger in an epic boxing spectacle. Fans of the beloved franchise will appreciate the hyper realistic aesthetic and vibrant training sequences that capture the raw intensity of a true heavyweight championship fight. Seeing these iconic powerhouses face off in brilliant detail brings a fresh energy to the legendary sports drama genre.

This fan made edit explores the ultimate test of legacy as Rocky Balboa prepares for the biggest fight of his life without the moody shadows of the past. By focusing on bright daylight environments and photorealistic camera work, my goal was to showcase every powerful punch with high budget clarity. The unbelievable presence of Mike Tyson and Arnold Schwarzenegger elevates the stakes to unprecedented heights for this final comeback story. Please drop your thoughts in the comments and let me know who you think would conquer this epic cinematic showdown.

Disclaimer: This video is a fan made concept trailer created purely for entertainment purposes. The storyboard and visuals were created entirely by me, and this project is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or connected to any official studio or production.

snippet.title: Subnautica 2 Early Access Gameplay Trailer
snippet.description:
Subnautica 2 is an underwater survival adventure game set on an all-new alien world. It is the next chapter in the Subnautica universe, developed by Unknown Worlds.

Driven from your home by ongoing conflict, Alterra offers you the chance at a new life. But as the colony ship CICADA shepherds you and your fellow Pioneers to your new home, something goes awry. The ship’s AI insists that your mission should continue. Stranded and faced with near-insurmountable odds, you must do everything in your power to survive. The future of humanity on this world is in your hands.

Subnautica 2 enters Early Access on May 14th, 2026, at 08:00 PDT / 15:00 UTC.

snippet.description:
In Nu Metro cinemas Friday 12th June, 2026: https://numet.ro/disclosureday

If you found out we weren’t alone, if someone showed you, proved it to you, would that frighten you? This summer, the truth belongs to eight billion people. We are coming close to ... Disclosure Day.

Disclosure Day is an upcoming American science fiction film directed by Steven Spielberg, from a screenplay by David Koepp based on a story by Spielberg. The film stars Emily Blunt, Josh O'Connor, Colin Firth, Eve Hewson, and Colman Domingo.
